name: Pull Request
description: Submit changes to Samaris OS
title: "[PR] Brief description of changes"
body: |
  ## Summary
  Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

  ## Motivation
  Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

  ## Changes
  - [ ] Change 1
  - [ ] Change 2
  - [ ] Change 3

  ## Testing
  Describe how you tested this change.

  ## Screenshots / Media
  If applicable, include screenshots or recordings.

  ## Checklist
  - [ ] Documentation updated if needed
  - [ ] No sensitive data or secrets added
  - [ ] Follows the project coding conventions
  - [ ] README updated if applicable
  - [ ] Tests added or updated if applicable

  ## Related Issues
  Fixes # (if applicable)

  ---
  *Samaris OS · Alpha One · contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
